text: Standing here, I am enveloped by an atmosphere of curiosity and innovation. The clean modern lines, the glass divisions, and the bold explanatory walls all create a sense of anticipation. I feel as though I am on the threshold of discovery, in a space devoted not only to research and development but also to the interplay of ideas, technology, and human connection. I experience a subtle awe at human ingenuity and a desire to absorb the knowledge contained within these walls.
